\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles.tex}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	{M_1 \otimes M_1} && {M_2 \otimes M_2} && {\mathds{1}} && {M_1} \\
	{M_1} && {M_2} &&&& {M_2}
	\arrow["{f \otimes f}", from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\mu_1}"', from=1-1, to=2-1]
	\arrow["{\mu_2}", from=1-3, to=2-3]
	\arrow["{\eta_1}", from=1-5, to=1-7]
	\arrow["{\eta_2}"', from=1-5, to=2-7]
	\arrow["f", from=1-7, to=2-7]
	\arrow["f"', from=2-1, to=2-3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
